allow: PowerShell(Get-Content 'C:\\Users\\tosei\\work\\flight-route\\telemetry.csv' | Select-Object -Skip 1 | ConvertFrom-Csv -Header time_s,x_m,y_m,z_m,vx,vy,vz,speed,ax,ay,az,accel_mag,el,az2 | Select-Object time_s, speed, accel_mag | Where-Object { [double]$_.speed -gt 240 } | Select-Object -First 40 | Format-Table -AutoSize)
